name: dkmediaviewer
description: A minimalist, performant, and elegant photo and video viewer for React, extracted from diklein.com. Masonry grid, fly-in lightbox, a crossfading carousel, captions and camera EXIF data, light and dark modes, reduced-motion support, and one easter egg. Distributed through the shadcn registry.
author: David Klein (https://diklein.com)
